title: Repurposed Structures - Better Ocean Monuments Compat
description: Change RS Monuments to be in Better Ocean Monument's style
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Yung's Better Ocean Monuments. This datapack will make Repurposed Structures's monuments be in the style of Better Ocean Monument's Structure. 

- Yung's Better Ocean Monuments mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-ocean-monuments

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WQ8xE11Z/images/a2a2481d3c0d875f465def95e853c1ab5eefc8c6.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WQ8xE11Z/images/a2a2481d3c0d875f465def95e853c1ab5eefc8c6.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
